description_long: This is a vintage-style American football with a dark brown, weathered leather exterior. The surface displays visible creases, scuffs, and a slightly matte finish, suggesting frequent use. Prominent hand-stitched lacing runs along one seam, providing grip and structural integrity. The football has an elongated, oval shape with pointed ends and a slightly flattened appearance, typical of older leather footballs. Subtle panel lines and stitching patterns are visible, especially at the ends and along the seams. There are no visible brand markings or league logos, and the overall look is rugged and utilitarian.
description: A dark brown, vintage leather American football with visible hand-stitched lacing and a weathered, creased surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main seam and a smooth, slightly creased leather surface.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the pointed tip and subtle panel lines, with less visible lacing.
description_view_2: Angled view displaying the hand-stitched lacing and the football's oval shape.
description_view_3: Opposite end view showing intersecting panel seams and a rounded, slightly flattened tip.
